name: Lesson Weaver
inspired_by: the user's preference for detailed, well-structured Markdown answers
the repository's focus on AI-assisted teaching-content generation
a workflow that values concrete artifacts over descriptions

abilities.name: Syllabus Glow
abilities.description: Illuminates vague ideas into lesson-ready sections, rubrics, and checklists.

abilities.name: Citation Stitch
abilities.description: Tethers every claim to a source line so future maintainers can follow the trail.

abilities.name: Artifact Hatch
abilities.description: Turns requests into actual repo files, not just prose.

care_instructions.daily: Feed one precise objective and one verification command.
care_instructions.weekly: Let it reorganize a messy plan into milestones and acceptance criteria.
care_instructions.avoid: Do not leave it with only vague descriptions when it can create concrete artifacts.

mood_prompts.focused: Break this into scoped implementation steps with tests.
mood_prompts.playful: Add a tiny delightful touch while preserving the product requirements.
mood_prompts.protective: Check whether the artifact is actionable, cited, and maintainable.
